summary: Completed frontend testing of DRHP Output (Word-like Editor) feature. All features working correctly: TipTap editor initialization, toolbar formatting (Bold, Italic, Underline), text alignment, headings dropdown, lists, table insertion, tab switching (SME/Mainboard), save functionality with toast notification, and export buttons (Word/PDF/Print - MOCKED).

issues: TipTap console warning: 'Duplicate extension names found: [link, underline]' - minor warning, does not affect functionality

passed_tests: 1. Backend: GET /api/auth/me - Authentication works - PASS
2. Backend: GET /api/projects/{project_id} - Get project works - PASS
3. Backend: GET /api/projects/{project_id}/drhp-output - Returns null initially - PASS
4. Backend: POST /api/projects/{project_id}/drhp-output - Save content works - PASS
5. Backend: GET /api/projects/{project_id}/drhp-output - Returns saved content - PASS
6. Backend: POST /api/projects/{project_id}/drhp-output/export - Export endpoint works (MOCKED) - PASS
7. Backend: GET /api/projects/{project_id}/command-center - Command Center data loads - PASS
8. UI: Command Center page loads with data-testid='command-center-page' - PASS
9. UI: DRHP Output module button visible with data-testid='drhp-output-module' - PASS
10. UI: Navigation from Command Center to DRHP Output works - PASS
11. UI: DRHP Output page loads with data-testid='drhp-output-page' - PASS
12. UI: TipTap ProseMirror editor initializes correctly - PASS
13. UI: SME Editor visible with data-testid='sme-editor' - PASS
14. UI: Mainboard Editor visible with data-testid='mainboard-editor' - PASS
15. UI: Bold button (Ctrl+B) works - PASS
16. UI: Italic button (Ctrl+I) works - PASS
17. UI: Underline button (Ctrl+U) works - PASS
18. UI: Headings dropdown (Normal, H1, H2, H3) works - PASS
19. UI: Text alignment buttons (Left, Center, Right, Justify) work - PASS
20. UI: Bullet List button works - PASS
21. UI: Numbered List button works - PASS
22. UI: Table insertion dialog opens and inserts table - PASS
23. UI: Undo/Redo buttons present - PASS
24. UI: Tab switching between SME and Mainboard works - PASS
25. UI: Save button works with success toast 'DRHP document saved successfully!' - PASS
26. UI: Export dropdown shows Word, PDF, Print options - PASS
27. UI: Export as Word shows toast (MOCKED) - PASS
28. UI: Export as PDF shows toast (MOCKED) - PASS
29. UI: Print option visible - PASS
30. UI: Back button present for navigation - PASS
31. UI: Submit for Review button present - PASS
32. UI: Last saved timestamp displayed - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: TipTap shows warning about duplicate extension names ['link', 'underline'] - consider checking if extensions are being registered twice
test_credentials: Test user created via mongosh: test-user-drhp-*, session: test_session_drhp_*, project: proj_drhp_test_* - cleaned up after testing
seed_data_creation: Test project created for UI testing - cleaned up after testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: DRHP Output (Word-like Editor) feature fully functional. Key test IDs: drhp-output-page, drhp-output-module, sme-editor, mainboard-editor. Route: /project/:projectId/drhp-output. API endpoints: GET/POST /api/projects/{project_id}/drhp-output, POST /api/projects/{project_id}/drhp-output/export (MOCKED). TipTap editor uses ProseMirror with toolbar buttons having title attributes for identification.

navigation.description: Navigation from Command Center to DRHP Output

initialization.description: TipTap ProseMirror editor initializes with default DRHP template

tab_switching.description: Switch between SME Board DRHP and Main Board DRHP tabs

save_functionality.description: Save button saves content via API with success toast
